title: Automatically collect tax on invoices
excerpt: Learn how to automatically calculate tax on your invoices. > [Log in](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/tax) or [sign up](https://dashboard.stripe.com/register) for Stripe to enable Stripe Tax. On an *invoice* (Invoices are statements of amounts owed by a customer. They track the status of payments from draft through paid or otherwise finalized. Subscriptions automatically generate invoices, or you can manually create a one-off invoice), Stripe Tax calculates sales tax, VAT, and GST. To calculate these for each line item, Stripe uses: - Your [tax settings](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/tax) - The customer’s tax settings and location - The product tax code and price tax behavior
